j={"\121\075\048\053\089\043\072\061","\078\104\116\065\105\077\113\085\077\049\053\061","\053\088\099\052\101\105\097\065\076\118\061\061","\050\106\117\114","\101\103\052\054\052\121\084\051\050\076\104\104\104\110\117\075","\087\070\090\065\082\118\061\061","\112\120\076\111\052\069\052\078\052\070\086\047\111\106\072\089\047\047\061\061","\083\089\050\068\057\054\050\068\082\087\052\086\082\120\108\076","\069\120\090\068\111\054\104\098";"\102\119\069\110\108\101\072\061","\104\120\108\051\057\115\072\061";"\057\110\072\061";"\083\050\052\053\052\118\106\089\100\065\078\061","\071\111\090\066\075\113\072\116\053\056\085\061","\086\084\090\108\122\048\081\117\115\050\053\086\066\114\099\111\070\084\116\074\109\111\047\061";"\086\107\070\049\120\082\086\097\053\077\078\122\111\118\105\090\051\065\065\121";"\101\106\117\114\057\106\113\061";"\050\106\050\071\104\087\079\051\083\065\047\061";"\057\054\117\068\111\085\061\061","\101\048\101\051\057\121\052\080\047\113\076\081\113\103\055\089\083\048\121\061","\101\086\105\121\086\047\061\061";"\084\076\074\043\101\117\076\098\069\085\061\061","\082\089\086\086\083\053\061\061","\080\114\098\104\097\118\061\061","\101\106\090\097\101\054\070\114\104\087\072\061";"\083\106\084\086\057\106\118\061","\082\065\076\068\104\047\061\061";"\073\076\089\109\048\065\056\073","\048\079\043\081\080\068\120\115\057\118\061\061","\082\111\121\048\055\074\071\108\121\049\078\061","\069\106\075\089\068\103\088\110\066\070\047\061";"\084\069\079\043\101\047\061\061","\081\102\048\083\109\054\109\055\070\098\113\061";"\081\120\074\068\111\106\076\051\066\065\084\099\112\085\061\061";"\112\105\052\117\052\113\076\104\084\089\084\088\101\117\104\047\111\120\047\061";"\051\114\110\047\109\086\105\061","\082\105\118\070\050\068\116\106\054\106\055\117\104\076\052\107\084\105\105\061","\051\098\082\121\117\074\113\048\121\080\072\061","\073\053\061\061","\087\070\090\071\104\054\075\061";"\109\103\116\080\106\081\051\107";"\052\089\050\068\
